register.title: Create account
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.registrationFailed: Registration failed. Email may already be taken.
register.verificationSent: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.useResetLink: Use the link from your reset email.
resetPassword.linkExpired: This link is invalid or has expired.

verifyEmail.verifiedDescription: Your email has been confirmed. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.linkExpiredOrUsed: This verification link has expired or already been used.
verifyEmail.useVerificationLink: Use the link from your verification email.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a recovery code.
mfa.tokenExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
